name: Broadmoor Links
about: Broadmoor Golf Links features state-of-the-art Foresight Falcon simulators powered by ultra-high-speed camera technology for tour-level accuracy and ball flight simulation. The venue offers an immersive golf experience with over 80 world-class courses, including St Andrews and Pebble Beach. Originally designed by Karl Litten and rebuilt after Hurricane Helene, the facility combines a modern, resilient course design with a welcoming atmosphere suitable for families and golfers of all skill levels. Operating hours for simulators are 9 AM to 7 PM, with a full-service Bevy Bar & Grill available on-site.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level accuracy with Foresight Falcon simulators
Over 80 world-class courses including St Andrews and Pebble Beach
Welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels
Modern facility rebuilt with resilience and fun in mind

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service kitchen at The Bevy Bar & Grill
Full bar service available at The Bevy Bar & Grill

simulator_hardware.notes: Ultra-high-speed camera technology with tour-level accuracy

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, simulator venues typically provide club rentals or encourage bringing your own equipment for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has The Bevy Bar & Grill offering full food and bar service, but does not mention BYOB policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator rounds typically take 1.5-2 hours for 18 holes depending on player skill and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Broadmoor Golf Links welcomes families and is designed for fun across generations, making it kid-friendly.
